title: FOUNDATIONAL scoreboard EXP submitted by analyst; routing to curmudgeon for adversarial review; integration HOLD in effect
description: Analyst produced EXP-190 (expansion_type: FOUNDATIONAL_MODEL_CHANGE, status: DRAFT_AWAITING_HUMAN_GROUP_REVIEW) for new Scoreboard tab per HNOTE-SCOREBOARD-FOUNDATIONAL-001. Per HNOTE-SCOREBOARD-PIPELINE-ROUTING-001 (HARD HOLD POINT): decider routed EXP-190 to curmudgeon priority queue (queue_id 194) for adversarial review for human-group consumption. Integration is BLOCKED until operator posts HNOTE-SCOREBOARD-INTEGRATION-APPROVED-001. Tracking issue ISS-1205 created.
